title: Other accounts, board's authority to create
doc_html:
§951.55.  Other accounts, board's authority to create

The board of trustees may maintain such other accounts as it may deem necessary.

Redesignated from R.S. 17:1085 pursuant to R.S. 24:253.

§951.55.  Other accounts, board's authority to create
